name: Text Summarizer
description: Transform lengthy articles, documents, and text content into concise, meaningful summaries using advanced NLP. Get key points, bullet summaries, or paragraph-style condensed versions instantly.
shortDesc: Summarize long text into concise key points instantly

params.name: text
params.desc: The text content to summarize (max 10,000 characters)

data.summary: The article discusses the impact of artificial intelligence on modern healthcare, highlighting three key areas: diagnostic accuracy improvement by 40%, drug discovery acceleration, and personalized treatment plans.
key_points: Drug discovery timelines reduced from years to months
Personalized treatment plans based on patient data
Cost reduction of 30% in clinical trials

howItWorks: Send your text content via a POST request with your API key
Our NLP engine analyzes sentence importance and semantic meaning
Key information is extracted and ranked by relevance
A coherent summary is generated in your chosen format
Receive the structured JSON response with summary and metadata
